response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-01:46: Identified 'フレンズ' (Rebecca) performed by Momosuzu Nene and Ookami Mio. Lyrics searched and verified. 2. 01:46-01:49: Transition scene detected. 3. 01:49-04:54: Identified '青空のラプソディ' (fhána) performed by Momosuzu Nene, Shirogane Noel, and Houshou Marine. Lyrics searched and verified.
response.global_summary: The video features two musical performances by Hololive VTubers. First, Momosuzu Nene and Ookami Mio perform the song 'Friends'. Then, after a short transition, Momosuzu Nene, Shirogane Noel, and Houshou Marine perform 'Aozora no Rhapsody'.

scenes.description: Momosuzu Nene and Ookami Mio perform 'Friends' on stage.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The day we exchanged a kiss
I couldn't even look at my mom's face
I collected coins in my pocket
And counted our dreams one by one
Look, that's our hideout
A secret memory oh
Where did it break, oh friends?
On the days we looked down, we stared at each other
When we linked our fingers, oh friends
I felt time stop
Hey, do you remember?
That song that suited the sunset well
You would always fall silent
And hum it sadly, even though
Now time flows and the melody is dyed in sepia oh
We can never go back, oh friends
We looked further apart than strangers
We were always running, oh friends
Those eyes were so dear
Where did it break, oh friends?
On the days we looked down, we stared at each other
When we linked our fingers, oh friends
I felt time stop
We can never go back, oh friends
We looked further apart than strangers
We were always running, oh friends
Those eyes were so dear

scenes.description: Transition period between performances with black screen.
Momosuzu Nene, Shirogane Noel, and Houshou Marine perform 'Aozora no Rhapsody'.
scenes.performer_in_video: Momosuzu Nene, Shirogane Noel, and Houshou Marine
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Chu chu yeah! Please me!
Chu chu yeah! Without you!
あー！なんてことだ
些細な過ちだ
自分のことに タララッタラッタ手焼く
どうして突然？
逃げ切ったっていいでしょ？
だけどなんだか気まぐれモードになり
そんな気分になっちゃって
始まりはそんな風で
つまりはらしくないようで
でも今じゃ扉開けてほら
声が聴こえるよ さあ！行こう！
どこへでも
僕は君の翼に
なれる勇気があるよ！
(Please stay with me)
どんな試練も怖くない
その魔法があるから
(なんてったってコングラッチュレーション！)
初めて出会う世界に
花束を贈ろう
(Made in society)
ただこの瞬間結ばれるよ
ちぐはぐなコミュニケーション？
でも別に構わない
明日から平和なら！
Chu chu yeah! Without you!
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Chu chu yeah! Please me!
Chu chu yeah! Without you!
Ah! What a thing
A trivial mistake
I'm fiddling with my own affairs, tara-ratta-ratta
Why suddenly?
It's fine to run away, right?
But somehow I'm in a fickle mode
And got into that kind of mood
The beginning was like that
In short, it didn't seem like me
But now I open the door, look
I can hear your voice
Come on! Let's go!
Anywhere
I have the courage
To become your wings!
(Please stay with me)
I'm not afraid of any trials
Because I have that magic
(Whatever you say, congratulations!)
Let's give a bouquet
To the world we meet for the first time
(Made in society)
Just in this moment, we are connected
A mismatched communication?
But I don't really care
If it's peaceful from tomorrow on!
Chu chu yeah! Without you!
